action_mappings_indef.release_operating_room_block: release an operating room block {} from a reallocation case {}

action_mappings_indef.release_nursing_reservation: release a nursing team {} from a reallocation case {} reservation

action_mappings_indef.release_anesthesia_reservation: release anesthesia reservation of an anesthesia team {} for a reallocation case {}

predicate_mappings.case_assigned_block: {} is assigned to the operating room block {}
predicate_mappings.case_clinical_confirmation_obtained: clinical confirmation has been obtained for {}
predicate_mappings.case_operational_readiness_confirmed: operational readiness has been confirmed for {}
predicate_mappings.assigned_nursing_team: {} is the assigned nursing team for {}
predicate_mappings.assigned_anesthesia_team: {} is the assigned anesthesia team for {}
predicate_mappings.assigned_special_equipment: {} is the assigned special equipment for {}
predicate_mappings.case_scheduled_slot: {} is scheduled for the time slot {}
predicate_mappings.case_credential_verification_recorded: the credential verification for {} is recorded
predicate_mappings.case_final_clinical_signoff: the final clinical signoff for {} is completed
predicate_mappings.case_document_applied: the document {} is applied to the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_supply_and_equipment_verified: the supply and equipment for the case {} are verified
predicate_mappings.aux_or_available: the auxiliary operating room {} is available
predicate_mappings.case_block_eligible: the reallocation case {} is eligible for the operating room block {}
predicate_mappings.case_timeslot_eligible: the reallocation case {} is eligible for the time slot {}
predicate_mappings.case_surgeon_eligible: the reallocation case {} is eligible for the surgeon {}
predicate_mappings.case_nursing_eligible: the reallocation case {} is eligible for the nursing team {}
predicate_mappings.case_anesthesia_eligible: the reallocation case {} is eligible for the anesthesia team {}
predicate_mappings.case_supplykit_eligible: the reallocation case {} is eligible for the supply kit {}
predicate_mappings.case_equipment_eligible: the reallocation case {} is eligible for the special equipment {}
predicate_mappings.case_assigned_approver_group: the reallocation case {} is assigned to the approver group {}
predicate_mappings.case_document_registered: the approval document {} is registered for the reallocation case {}
predicate_mappings.case_assigned_aux_or: {} is assigned to the auxiliary operating room {}
predicate_mappings.clinical_review_requested: a clinical review is requested for {}

preconditions: I can only register a reallocation case A if it is not the case that A is a registered case and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I register a reallocation case A, it is the case that A is a registered case

claim_operating_room_block.description: claim an operating room block B for a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only claim an operating room block B for a reallocation case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the block B is available and the reallocation case A is eligible for the operating room block B
I can only claim an operating room block B for a reallocation case A if it is not the case that A has a block
effects: Once I claim an operating room block B for a reallocation case A, it is the case that A is assigned to the operating room block B and A has a block
Once I claim an operating room block B for a reallocation case A, it is not the case anymore that the block B is available

release_operating_room_block.description: release an operating room block B from a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only release an operating room block B from a reallocation case A if it is the case that A is assigned to the operating room block B
I can only release an operating room block B from a reallocation case A if it is not the case that the schedule for A is confirmed and it is not the case that department approval for A is obtained
effects: Once I release an operating room block B from a reallocation case A, it is the case that the block B is available

Once I release an operating room block B from a reallocation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the operating room block B and it is not the case anymore that A has a block and it is not the case anymore that clinical confirmation has been obtained for A and it is not the case anymore that operational readiness has been confirmed for A and it is not the case anymore that the credential verification for A is recorded and it is not the case anymore that the final clinical signoff for A is completed and it is not the case anymore that a clinical review is requested for A

assign_auxiliary_operating_room.description: assign an auxiliary operating room B to a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only assign an auxiliary operating room B to a reallocation case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the auxiliary operating room B is available
effects: Once I assign an auxiliary operating room B to a reallocation case A, it is the case that A is assigned to the auxiliary operating room B
Once I assign an auxiliary operating room B to a reallocation case A, it is not the case anymore that the auxiliary operating room B is available

release_auxiliary_operating_room.description: release an auxiliary operating room B from a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only release an auxiliary operating room B from a reallocation case A if it is the case that A is assigned to the auxiliary operating room B
effects: Once I release an auxiliary operating room B from a reallocation case A, it is the case that the auxiliary operating room B is available
Once I release an auxiliary operating room B from a reallocation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the auxiliary operating room B

confirm_aux_or_for_case.description: confirm an auxiliary operating room B for a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only confirm an auxiliary operating room B for a reallocation case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and A has a block and A is assigned to the auxiliary operating room B
I can only confirm an auxiliary operating room B for a reallocation case A if it is not the case that clinical confirmation has been obtained for A
effects: Once I confirm an auxiliary operating room B for a reallocation case A, it is the case that clinical confirmation has been obtained for A

perform_credential_verification.description: perform credential verification for a reallocation case A by a credential reviewer B
preconditions: I can only perform credential verification for a reallocation case A by a credential reviewer B if it is the case that A is a registered case and A has a block and the credential reviewer B is available
I can only perform credential verification for a reallocation case A by a credential reviewer B if it is not the case that clinical confirmation has been obtained for A
effects: Once I perform credential verification for a reallocation case A by a credential reviewer B, it is the case that clinical confirmation has been obtained for A and the credential verification for A is recorded
Once I perform credential verification for a reallocation case A by a credential reviewer B, it is not the case anymore that the credential reviewer B is available

perform_facilities_check.description: perform facilities check for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B by a facilities coordinator C
preconditions: I can only perform facilities check for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B by a facilities coordinator C if it is the case that clinical confirmation has been obtained for A and A has a block and A is assigned to the auxiliary operating room B and the facilities coordinator C is available
I can only perform facilities check for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B by a facilities coordinator C if it is not the case that operational readiness has been confirmed for A
effects: Once I perform facilities check for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B by a facilities coordinator C, it is the case that operational readiness has been confirmed for A
Once I perform facilities check for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B by a facilities coordinator C, it is not the case anymore that the credential verification for A is recorded

apply_approval_document_for_readiness.description: apply an approval document B for readiness to a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only apply an approval document B for readiness to a reallocation case A if it is the case that A has a block and the document B is applied to the case A
I can only apply an approval document B for readiness to a reallocation case A if it is not the case that operational readiness has been confirmed for A
effects: Once I apply an approval document B for readiness to a reallocation case A, it is the case that operational readiness has been confirmed for A
Once I apply an approval document B for readiness to a reallocation case A, it is not the case anymore that the credential verification for A is recorded

reserve_surgeon_for_case.description: reserve a surgeon B for a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a surgeon B for a reallocation case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the surgeon B is available and the reallocation case A is eligible for the surgeon B
effects: Once I reserve a surgeon B for a reallocation case A, it is the case that B is the assigned surgeon for A
Once I reserve a surgeon B for a reallocation case A, it is not the case anymore that the surgeon B is available

release_surgeon_reservation.description: release a surgeon B reservation for a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only release a surgeon B reservation for a reallocation case A if it is the case that B is the assigned surgeon for A
effects: Once I release a surgeon B reservation for a reallocation case A, it is the case that the surgeon B is available
Once I release a surgeon B reservation for a reallocation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is the assigned surgeon for A

reserve_nursing_team.description: reserve a nursing team B for a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a nursing team B for a reallocation case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the nursing team B is available and the reallocation case A is eligible for the nursing team B
effects: Once I reserve a nursing team B for a reallocation case A, it is the case that B is the assigned nursing team for A
Once I reserve a nursing team B for a reallocation case A, it is not the case anymore that the nursing team B is available

release_nursing_reservation.description: release a nursing team B from a reallocation case A reservation
preconditions: I can only release a nursing team B from a reallocation case A reservation if it is the case that B is the assigned nursing team for A
effects: Once I release a nursing team B from a reallocation case A reservation, it is the case that the nursing team B is available
Once I release a nursing team B from a reallocation case A reservation, it is not the case anymore that B is the assigned nursing team for A

reserve_anesthesia_team.description: reserve an anesthesia team B for a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an anesthesia team B for a reallocation case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the anesthesia team B is available and the reallocation case A is eligible for the anesthesia team B
effects: Once I reserve an anesthesia team B for a reallocation case A, it is the case that B is the assigned anesthesia team for A
Once I reserve an anesthesia team B for a reallocation case A, it is not the case anymore that the anesthesia team B is available

release_anesthesia_reservation.description: release anesthesia reservation of an anesthesia team B for a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only release anesthesia reservation of an anesthesia team B for a reallocation case A if it is the case that B is the assigned anesthesia team for A
effects: Once I release anesthesia reservation of an anesthesia team B for a reallocation case A, it is the case that the anesthesia team B is available
Once I release anesthesia reservation of an anesthesia team B for a reallocation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is the assigned anesthesia team for A

reserve_special_equipment.description: reserve a special equipment B for a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a special equipment B for a reallocation case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and the special equipment B is available and the reallocation case A is eligible for the special equipment B
effects: Once I reserve a special equipment B for a reallocation case A, it is the case that B is the assigned special equipment for A
Once I reserve a special equipment B for a reallocation case A, it is not the case anymore that the special equipment B is available

release_special_equipment.description: release a special equipment B from a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only release a special equipment B from a reallocation case A if it is the case that B is the assigned special equipment for A
effects: Once I release a special equipment B from a reallocation case A, it is the case that the special equipment B is available
Once I release a special equipment B from a reallocation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is the assigned special equipment for A

schedule_time_slot_and_confirm.description: schedule a reallocation case A for a time slot B with a surgeon C and a nursing team D and confirm the schedule
preconditions: I can only schedule a reallocation case A for a time slot B with a surgeon C and a nursing team D and confirm the schedule if it is the case that A has a block and C is the assigned surgeon for A and D is the assigned nursing team for A and the time slot B is available and the reallocation case A is eligible for the time slot B
I can only schedule a reallocation case A for a time slot B with a surgeon C and a nursing team D and confirm the schedule if it is not the case that the schedule for A is confirmed
effects: Once I schedule a reallocation case A for a time slot B with a surgeon C and a nursing team D and confirm the schedule, it is the case that A is scheduled for the time slot B and the schedule for A is confirmed
Once I schedule a reallocation case A for a time slot B with a surgeon C and a nursing team D and confirm the schedule, it is not the case anymore that the time slot B is available

schedule_time_slot_with_equipment_and_su.description: schedule a reallocation case A for a time slot B with an anesthesia team C and check a supply kit D availability and confirm the schedule
preconditions: I can only schedule a reallocation case A for a time slot B with an anesthesia team C and check a supply kit D availability and confirm the schedule if it is the case that A has a block and C is the assigned anesthesia team for A and the supply kit D is available and the time slot B is available and the reallocation case A is eligible for the time slot B and the reallocation case A is eligible for the supply kit D

I can only schedule a reallocation case A for a time slot B with an anesthesia team C and check a supply kit D availability and confirm the schedule if it is not the case that the schedule for A is confirmed
effects: Once I schedule a reallocation case A for a time slot B with an anesthesia team C and check a supply kit D availability and confirm the schedule, it is the case that A is scheduled for the time slot B and the schedule for A is confirmed and a clinical review is requested for A and the credential verification for A is recorded

Once I schedule a reallocation case A for a time slot B with an anesthesia team C and check a supply kit D availability and confirm the schedule, it is not the case anymore that the time slot B is available and it is not the case anymore that the supply kit D is available

clear_clinical_followup_review.description: clear clinical follow up review for a reallocation case A with a surgeon B and a nursing team C
preconditions: I can only clear clinical follow up review for a reallocation case A with a surgeon B and a nursing team C if it is the case that the schedule for A is confirmed and a clinical review is requested for A and B is the assigned surgeon for A and C is the assigned nursing team for A
effects: Once I clear clinical follow up review for a reallocation case A with a surgeon B and a nursing team C, it is not the case anymore that a clinical review is requested for A and it is not the case anymore that the credential verification for A is recorded

obtain_department_approval.description: obtain department approval for a reallocation case A with a surgeon B, a nursing team C, and a department approver D
preconditions: I can only obtain department approval for a reallocation case A with a surgeon B, a nursing team C, and a department approver D if it is the case that operational readiness has been confirmed for A and the schedule for A is confirmed and B is the assigned surgeon for A and C is the assigned nursing team for A and the reallocation case A is assigned to the approver group D

I can only obtain department approval for a reallocation case A with a surgeon B, a nursing team C, and a department approver D if it is not the case that the credential verification for A is recorded and it is not the case that department approval for A is obtained
effects: Once I obtain department approval for a reallocation case A with a surgeon B, a nursing team C, and a department approver D, it is the case that department approval for A is obtained

obtain_administrative_approval.description: obtain administrative approval for a reallocation case A with an anesthesia team B, a special equipment C, and a compliance approver D
preconditions: I can only obtain administrative approval for a reallocation case A with an anesthesia team B, a special equipment C, and a compliance approver D if it is the case that operational readiness has been confirmed for A and the schedule for A is confirmed and B is the assigned anesthesia team for A and C is the assigned special equipment for A and the reallocation case A is assigned to the approver group D

I can only obtain administrative approval for a reallocation case A with an anesthesia team B, a special equipment C, and a compliance approver D if it is not the case that department approval for A is obtained
effects: Once I obtain administrative approval for a reallocation case A with an anesthesia team B, a special equipment C, and a compliance approver D, it is the case that department approval for A is obtained and the credential verification for A is recorded

finalize_administrative_approval.description: finalize administrative approval for a reallocation case A with a surgeon B and a nursing team C
preconditions: I can only finalize administrative approval for a reallocation case A with a surgeon B and a nursing team C if it is the case that department approval for A is obtained and the credential verification for A is recorded and B is the assigned surgeon for A and C is the assigned nursing team for A
effects: Once I finalize administrative approval for a reallocation case A with a surgeon B and a nursing team C, it is the case that the final clinical signoff for A is completed

Once I finalize administrative approval for a reallocation case A with a surgeon B and a nursing team C, it is not the case anymore that the credential verification for A is recorded and it is not the case anymore that operational readiness has been confirmed for A and it is not the case anymore that a clinical review is requested for A

perform_post_approval_readiness_check.description: perform post approval readiness check for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B with a facilities coordinator C
preconditions: I can only perform post approval readiness check for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B with a facilities coordinator C if it is the case that the final clinical signoff for A is completed and department approval for A is obtained and A has a block and A is assigned to the auxiliary operating room B and the facilities coordinator C is available

I can only perform post approval readiness check for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B with a facilities coordinator C if it is not the case that operational readiness has been confirmed for A
effects: Once I perform post approval readiness check for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B with a facilities coordinator C, it is the case that operational readiness has been confirmed for A

record_facilities_check_completion.description: record facilities check completion for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B
preconditions: I can only record facilities check completion for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B if it is the case that department approval for A is obtained and operational readiness has been confirmed for A and A is assigned to the auxiliary operating room B

I can only record facilities check completion for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B if it is not the case that the credential verification for A is recorded and it is not the case that facilities check for A is completed
effects: Once I record facilities check completion for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B, it is the case that facilities check for A is completed

record_credential_verification_and_mark_.description: record credential verification and mark facilities check complete for a reallocation case A by a credential reviewer B
preconditions: I can only record credential verification and mark facilities check complete for a reallocation case A by a credential reviewer B if it is the case that department approval for A is obtained and operational readiness has been confirmed for A and the credential reviewer B is available

I can only record credential verification and mark facilities check complete for a reallocation case A by a credential reviewer B if it is not the case that the credential verification for A is recorded and it is not the case that facilities check for A is completed
effects: Once I record credential verification and mark facilities check complete for a reallocation case A by a credential reviewer B, it is the case that facilities check for A is completed
Once I record credential verification and mark facilities check complete for a reallocation case A by a credential reviewer B, it is not the case anymore that the credential reviewer B is available

register_approval_document_for_case.description: register an approval document B for a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only register an approval document B for a reallocation case A if it is the case that facilities check for A is completed and the approval document B is available and A is associated with B
effects: Once I register an approval document B for a reallocation case A, it is the case that the approval document B is registered for the reallocation case A
Once I register an approval document B for a reallocation case A, it is not the case anymore that the approval document B is available

apply_scheduled_case_document_to_ad_hoc_.description: apply an approval document C from a scheduled block case B to an ad hoc block case A
preconditions: I can only apply an approval document C from a scheduled block case B to an ad hoc block case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and A is an ad hoc case and A is linked to the document C and the approval document C is registered for the reallocation case B
I can only apply an approval document C from a scheduled block case B to an ad hoc block case A if it is not the case that the document C is applied to the case A
effects: Once I apply an approval document C from a scheduled block case B to an ad hoc block case A, it is the case that the document C is applied to the case A

mark_operational_readiness_check_complet.description: mark operational readiness check complete for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B by a facilities coordinator C
preconditions: I can only mark operational readiness check complete for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B by a facilities coordinator C if it is the case that A is a registered case and A is an ad hoc case and operational readiness has been confirmed for A and facilities check for A is completed and A is assigned to the auxiliary operating room B and the facilities coordinator C is available

I can only mark operational readiness check complete for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B by a facilities coordinator C if it is not the case that the supply and equipment for the case A are verified
effects: Once I mark operational readiness check complete for a reallocation case A in an auxiliary operating room B by a facilities coordinator C, it is the case that the supply and equipment for the case A are verified

close_case_finalization.description: close case finalization for a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only close case finalization for a reallocation case A if it is the case that A is a scheduled case and A is a registered case and A has a block and the schedule for A is confirmed and department approval for A is obtained and facilities check for A is completed and operational readiness has been confirmed for A
I can only close case finalization for a reallocation case A if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close case finalization for a reallocation case A, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_document.description: close case with document an approval document B for a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only close case with document an approval document B for a reallocation case A if it is the case that A is an ad hoc case and A is a registered case and A has a block and the schedule for A is confirmed and department approval for A is obtained and facilities check for A is completed and operational readiness has been confirmed for A and the document B is applied to the case A
I can only close case with document an approval document B for a reallocation case A if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close case with document an approval document B for a reallocation case A, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_supply_verification.description: close case with supply verification for a reallocation case A
preconditions: I can only close case with supply verification for a reallocation case A if it is the case that A is an ad hoc case and A is a registered case and A has a block and the schedule for A is confirmed and department approval for A is obtained and facilities check for A is completed and operational readiness has been confirmed for A and the supply and equipment for the case A are verified
I can only close case with supply verification for a reallocation case A if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close case with supply verification for a reallocation case A, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.claim_operating_room_block: claim operating room block {?operating_room_block} for reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_operating_room_block: release operating room block {?operating_room_block} from reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_auxiliary_operating_room: assign auxiliary operating room {?auxiliary_operating_room} to reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_auxiliary_operating_room: release auxiliary operating room {?auxiliary_operating_room} from reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_aux_or_for_case: confirm auxiliary operating room {?auxiliary_operating_room} for reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.perform_credential_verification: perform credential verification for reallocation case {?reallocation_case} by credential reviewer {?credential_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.perform_facilities_check: perform facilities check for reallocation case {?reallocation_case} in auxiliary operating room {?auxiliary_operating_room} by facilities coordinator {?facilities_coordinator}
action_nl_templates.apply_approval_document_for_readiness: apply approval document {?approval_document} for readiness to reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_surgeon_reservation: release surgeon {?surgeon} reservation for reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_nursing_team: reserve nursing team {?nursing_team} for reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_nursing_reservation: release nursing team {?nursing_team} from reallocation case {?reallocation_case} reservation
action_nl_templates.reserve_anesthesia_team: reserve anesthesia team {?anesthesia_team} for reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_anesthesia_reservation: release anesthesia reservation of anesthesia team {?anesthesia_team} for reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_special_equipment: reserve special equipment {?special_equipment} for reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_special_equipment: release special equipment {?special_equipment} from reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.schedule_time_slot_and_confirm: schedule reallocation case {?reallocation_case} for time slot {?time_slot} with surgeon {?surgeon} and nursing team {?nursing_team} and confirm the schedule
action_nl_templates.schedule_time_slot_with_equipment_and_su: schedule reallocation case {?reallocation_case} for time slot {?time_slot} with anesthesia team {?anesthesia_team} and check supply kit {?supply_kit} availability and confirm the schedule
action_nl_templates.clear_clinical_followup_review: clear clinical follow-up review for reallocation case {?reallocation_case} with surgeon {?surgeon} and nursing team {?nursing_team}
action_nl_templates.obtain_department_approval: obtain department approval for reallocation case {?reallocation_case} with surgeon {?surgeon}, nursing team {?nursing_team}, and department approver {?department_approver}
action_nl_templates.obtain_administrative_approval: obtain administrative approval for reallocation case {?reallocation_case} with anesthesia team {?anesthesia_team}, special equipment {?special_equipment}, and compliance approver {?compliance_approver}
action_nl_templates.finalize_administrative_approval: finalize administrative approval for reallocation case {?reallocation_case} with surgeon {?surgeon} and nursing team {?nursing_team}
action_nl_templates.perform_post_approval_readiness_check: perform post-approval readiness check for reallocation case {?reallocation_case} in auxiliary operating room {?auxiliary_operating_room} with facilities coordinator {?facilities_coordinator}
action_nl_templates.record_facilities_check_completion: record facilities check completion for reallocation case {?reallocation_case} in auxiliary operating room {?auxiliary_operating_room}
action_nl_templates.record_credential_verification_and_mark_: record credential verification and mark facilities check complete for reallocation case {?reallocation_case} by credential reviewer {?credential_reviewer}
action_nl_templates.register_approval_document_for_case: register approval document {?approval_document} for reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.apply_scheduled_case_document_to_ad_hoc_: apply approval document {?approval_document} from scheduled block case {?scheduled_block_case} to ad hoc block case {?ad_hoc_block_case}
action_nl_templates.mark_operational_readiness_check_complet: mark operational readiness check complete for reallocation case {?reallocation_case} in auxiliary operating room {?auxiliary_operating_room} by facilities coordinator {?facilities_coordinator}
action_nl_templates.close_case_finalization: close case finalization for reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_document: close case with document approval document {?approval_document} for reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_supply_verification: close case with supply verification for reallocation case {?reallocation_case}

predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_block: {?reallocation_case} is assigned to the operating room block {?operating_room_block}
predicate_nl_templates.case_clinical_confirmation_obtained: clinical confirmation has been obtained for {?reallocation_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_operational_readiness_confirmed: operational readiness has been confirmed for {?reallocation_case}

predicate_nl_templates.assigned_anesthesia_team: {?anesthesia_team} is the assigned anesthesia team for {?reallocation_case}
predicate_nl_templates.assigned_special_equipment: {?special_equipment} is the assigned special equipment for {?reallocation_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_scheduled_slot: {?reallocation_case} is scheduled for the time slot {?time_slot}
predicate_nl_templates.case_credential_verification_recorded: the credential verification for {?reallocation_case} is recorded
predicate_nl_templates.case_final_clinical_signoff: the final clinical signoff for {?reallocation_case} is completed

predicate_nl_templates.case_supply_and_equipment_verified: the supply and equipment for the case {?reallocation_case} are verified
predicate_nl_templates.aux_or_available: the auxiliary operating room {?auxiliary_operating_room} is available

predicate_nl_templates.case_timeslot_eligible: the reallocation case {?reallocation_case} is eligible for the time slot {?time_slot}
predicate_nl_templates.case_surgeon_eligible: the reallocation case {?reallocation_case} is eligible for the surgeon {?surgeon}
predicate_nl_templates.case_nursing_eligible: the reallocation case {?reallocation_case} is eligible for the nursing team {?nursing_team}
predicate_nl_templates.case_anesthesia_eligible: the reallocation case {?reallocation_case} is eligible for the anesthesia team {?anesthesia_team}
predicate_nl_templates.case_supplykit_eligible: the reallocation case {?reallocation_case} is eligible for the supply kit {?supply_kit}
predicate_nl_templates.case_equipment_eligible: the reallocation case {?reallocation_case} is eligible for the special equipment {?special_equipment}
predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_approver_group: the reallocation case {?reallocation_case} is assigned to the approver group {?approver_group}
predicate_nl_templates.case_document_registered: the approval document {?approval_document} is registered for the reallocation case {?reallocation_case}
predicate_nl_templates.case_assigned_aux_or: {?reallocation_case} is assigned to the auxiliary operating room {?auxiliary_operating_room}
predicate_nl_templates.clinical_review_requested: a clinical review is requested for {?reallocation_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.clear_clinical_followup_review: clear clinical follow-up review for a reallocation case {?reallocation_case} with a surgeon {?surgeon} and a nursing team {?nursing_team}

action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_administrative_approval: finalize administrative approval for a reallocation case {?reallocation_case} with a surgeon {?surgeon} and a nursing team {?nursing_team}

action_nl_templates_indef.record_credential_verification_and_mark_: record credential verification and mark facilities check complete for a reallocation case {?reallocation_case} by a credential reviewer {?credential_reviewer}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a reallocation case or a operating room block or a time slot or a nursing team or a surgeon or a anesthesia team or a auxiliary operating room or a credential reviewer or a approval document or a facilities coordinator or a supply kit or a special equipment or a approver group is also a object
Everything that is a department approver or a compliance approver is also a approver group
Everything that is a scheduled block case or a ad hoc block case is also a reallocation case
